bio: Eskandar Momeni is Iran's Minister of Interior under [Masoud Pezeshkian](/people/masoud-pezeshkian), appointed in August 2024. A senior security official with a military background, he previously served in senior positions in law enforcement and security agencies. He superseded [Ahmad Vahidi](/people/ahmad-vahidi)'s hardline tenure at the Interior Ministry.
editorial_notes: Born 1965. Military background. Appointed Interior Minister August 2024.
